attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID          
,LOG_TIMESTAMP                 
,INCIDENT_ID                   
,SERVICE_ORDER_ID              
,SERVICE_ORDER_LINE            
,ENTITLEMENT_RESULT_CODE       
,ENTITLEMENT_RESULT            
,PRIMARY_REASON_CODE           
,PRIMARY_REASON_DESC           
,ENTITLEMENT_KEY_LOOKUP_CODE   
,ENTITLEMENT_KEY               
,ECL_SCORE                     
,CONTRACT_ID                   
,CONTRACT_NUMBER               
,CONTRACT_STATUS               
,CONTRACT_START_DATE           
,CONTRACT_END_DATE             
,SERVICE_LINE_ID               
,SERVICE_LINE_NAME             
,SERVICE_LINE_STATUS           
,SERVICE_LINE_START_DATE       
,SERVICE_LINE_END_DATE         
,INSTALLED_SITE_ID             
,INSTALLED_SITE_NUMBER         
,ITEM_FAMILY_ID                
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,PRODUCT_ID                    
,INSTANCE_ID                   
,SERIAL_NUMBER                 
,SN_REUSE_FLAG                 
,SN_REUSE_COUNT                
,WARRANTY_CONTRACT_ID          
,WARRANTY_SERVICE_LINE_ID      
,WARRANTY_TYPE                 
,WARRANTY_STATUS               
,WARRANTY_START_DATE           
,WARRANTY_END_DATE             
,CONTACT_PARTY_ID              
,VSESSION_USERNAME             
,ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_CCO_ID        
,OAS_APPL_SHORT_NAME           
,SQL_LAST_UPDATE               
,TAC_RANK                      
,RE_ENTITLEMENT_FLAG           
,CP_LINE_id                    
,CP_LINE_STATUS                
,INSTALLED_SITE_CUSTOMER_NAME  
,USER_PROVIDED_SN              
,ENFORCED_KEY                  
,ENFORCED_ECL_SCORE            
,ENFORCED_KEY_LOOKUP_CODE      
,CLAIMED_PID                   
,CLAIMED_PID_NAME              
,REPLACEMENT_PART_ID           
,REQUESTED_PILLAR              
,END_CUSTOMER_SITE_COUNTRY     
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,TOPIC_NAME                    
,UPDATED_ON_KAFKA              
,OFFSET_NUMBER                 
,PARTITION_NUMBER              
,EDW_CREATED_DTM               
FROM $$STGDB.ST_EB_XXCTS_ENT_AUDIT_LOG ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_EB_XXCTS_ENT_AUDIT_LOG EL
WHERE EL.ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID=ST.ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID)
